title: juncus fontanesii subsp. brachyanthus
intro: Juncus fontanesii subsp. brachyanthus, also known as the short-stemmed rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is a perennial grass-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juncus fontanesii subsp. brachyanthus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction to be used as a herbal remedy, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
